E : Type u_3

P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝⁶ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁵ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderBot ι
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace ι
inst✝² : SecondCountableTopology ι
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX1 : Martingale X 𝓕 P
hX2 : ∀ (ω : Ω), RightContinuous fun x => X x ω
⊢ @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁸ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝³ X 𝓕 P ↔
    UniformIntegrable X 1 P
